Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 2.8 cm x 3.8 cm x 0.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 40% slough, 60% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Continue current dressing regimen.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Venous to Left lower leg / Measures 2.8 cm x 3.8 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
